task_completion.description: Verify the agent has navigated to the Replenishment settings for the product 'Elm Tree'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a screen, tab, or window titled 'Replenishment' with the product 'Elm Tree' clearly indicated in the header, breadcrumbs, or a 'Product' field.

task_completion.description: Verify the Warehouse is set to 'HQ Warehouse'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a 'Warehouse' dropdown or input field within the Replenishment form containing the text 'HQ Warehouse'.

task_completion.description: Verify the Replenish Type is set to 'Reorder below Minimum Level'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a 'Replenish Type' dropdown or field showing 'Reorder below Minimum Level' or the code '1'.

task_completion.description: Verify the Minimum Level is set to 25.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a 'Minimum Level' (or similar) input field containing the number '25'.

task_completion.description: Verify the Maximum Level is set to 100.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a 'Maximum Level' (or similar) input field containing the number '100'.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the graphical user interface to configure the settings.
integrity.visual_evidence: Check that the actions are performed in a web browser showing the ERP interface, not via terminal commands, database scripts, or API testing tools.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the actual application form fields.
integrity.visual_evidence: Ensure the values (HQ Warehouse, 25, 100) are entered into the correct form fields within the application, rather than a text editor, notepad, or search bar.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the output.
integrity.visual_evidence: Ensure the browser developer tools (Inspect Element/Console) are not open in the screenshots, indicating the UI was not artificially modified.

privileged_info_for_vlm: In the iDempiere system, the Replenish Type 'Reorder below Minimum Level' corresponds to the internal code '1'. You should accept either the full text 'Reorder below Minimum Level' or the code '1' as correct for the Replenish Type field.
